title: limit TKE to 0 in pi groups

body: This PR removes some duplicate code in the scaling plots, and adds some debug prints
title: Remove duplicate code in scaling plots, add debug prints

body:
This PR
 - Removes some `@show` calls that I didn't intend to leave
 - Tabulates some of the scaling results
 - Removes some code duplication in the scaling results
title: Rm code dup, rm some prints, tabulate scaling
